column1: # Existing: 13 L1 core cards + The Unwitnessed (L20). No L2/L3/L5/L9 prior to this pass.
# Adds: 2 L2, 12 L3 (4 per path x 3), 3 L5, 6 L9 (2 per path x 3), 1 additional L20 = 24 rows.

column3: Your footfalls stop returning to sensors; movement this turn leaves no record and your next strike gains edge.
Slip between packets. Reposition once without breaking a Veil state you currently hold.
Move into an enemy-occupied space as if you belong there; the squad's threat register skips you until you act.
Borrow a target's biometric handshake. You register as an ally to their faction's sensors until you deal damage.
Strike from the same formation as your target; the wound reads as friendly fire in their after-action logs.
When the alarm sounds, you were already gone. Negate the first Detect or Reveal effect made against you each round.
Sever a target's uplink. Until your next turn they cannot call for reinforcements or receive buffs from allies.
Flood a zone with masking noise; enemies inside cannot coordinate actions with allies outside the zone.
Intercept an enemy's final transmission. Cancel one reaction or called response they attempt this turn.
The target's augment feedback turns on them; their next attack roll suffers interference.
Pluck a fragment of your target's plan. Learn their next declared action; they cannot change it without spending AP.
Cast a stolen memory back at its owner; repeat the last attack an enemy made, against them.
Skim the target's recent memory. Reveal one hidden stat, cooldown, or intent and mark it as known to your allies.
Erase yourself from a target's recollection. They cannot target you on their next turn unless an ally reminds them.
Drop a pocket of total sensor silence over the field. For one round, no one inside sees outside; no one outside sees in.
Strike a target six times in the seams of their armor, then once more in the gap between heartbeats; compounds per previous strike this encounter.
Declare yourself unseen for the rest of the round; actions taken cannot be reacted to, but any witness left alive marks you forever.
For one round you do not exist on the battlefield's records; you act normally but no opponent may designate you as a target.
Leave a perfect double behind; the enemy squad treats it as you for a round while you act from anywhere in their formation.
Cut every wire in a wide zone. For one round no augment, summon, or remote asset in the area can receive input.
Choose a single enemy; their augmentations, network buffs, and allied links cut out for the rest of the encounter.
Pull a memory of command from the enemy leader; issue one of their orders back to their squad against them.
Replay every attack you have witnessed this encounter as a single sequenced strike against one target.

column1: # === L20 Capstone (1 additional; The Unwitnessed already exists) ===

column3: Capstone: declare a target's name stricken from every record in reach; allies forget them, augments ignore them, and your next strike writes the new ending.
